title: Weak Class Formal Hardening
scientificQuestion: Can Sovryn scale OS v1 Candidate into a receipt-backed OS v1.5 Candidate across a larger mixed workload while preserving route and package quality?
domain: Open Verifiable Science OS v1.5 Hardening and Scale Gauntlet
limitations: The workload is bounded and synthetic-public; it is not a claim about all science work.
Class-level acceleration status is limited to represented task classes and conservative baseline estimates.
Public packages are evidence-route packages, not expert review reports.
Temporal evaluation remains below class-level threshold.
Package replay is sampled, not exhaustive across every package.
No outside uptake or broad acceleration claim is made.
disclaimer: Bounded OS v1.5 candidate package. It reports receipt-backed class-level evidence only; it does not claim broad acceleration, outside uptake, discovery validation, prize significance, broad autonomous intelligence, regulated professional authority, high-risk capability, or universal validity.
